sections.paragraph:
fut. יְתוּב, Ch. i.q. Heb. שׁוּב to turn back, to return, Dan 4:31, 33 .

Aphel הֲתִיב to restore, to return, Ezr 6:5. הֲתִיב פִּתְגָּם i.q. Heb. הֵשִׁיב דָּבָר to answer, followed by an acc. of pers. Ezr 5:11 Dan 3:16 (as to the passage Dan 2:14, see עֵטָא ). ה׳ נִשְׁתְּוָנָא to return an epistle, to reply by letters, Ezr 5:5.
